name: agentic-ai-backend-audit
description: Senior adversarial audit of an AI-agent-built and/or agentic/LLM backend, run after an agent finishes a feature. 18 lenses across security & access control, prompt & agent safety, data protection & leakage (PII/PHI, RAG/embedding/log/cross-tenant), reliability, observability/evals/governance, and AI-authorship hygiene. Names each issue, cites file:line, warns 'this may cause <impact>', rates severity 0-4, and ends with a Ship/Fix-then-ship/Block verdict.
